changeList: 2.1.230-1-dc9863e: PR #139 - Handle failing v.redd.it CMAF downloads with DASH fallback (https://github.com/Laziassdev/ripme/pull/139) — ### Motivation - Some Reddit posts expose `v.redd.it` CMAF renditions (`CMAF_*.mp4`) that intermittently return non-2xx responses even though the post is viewable, causing downloads to fail.
